    Subclasses of AbstractFilterExpressionConverter in org.springframework.ai.chroma.vectorstore
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    ChromaFilterExpressionConverter
    Converts Filter.Expression into Chroma metadata filter expression format.

  • Uses of AbstractFilterExpressionConverter in org.springframework.ai.vectorstore.azure

    Subclasses of AbstractFilterExpressionConverter in org.springframework.ai.vectorstore.azure
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    AzureAiSearchFilterExpressionConverter
    Converts Filter.Expression into Azure Search OData filter syntax. https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/search/search-query-odata-filter

    Class
    Description
    class 
    ElasticsearchAiSearchFilterExpressionConverter
    ElasticsearchAiSearchFilterExpressionConverter is a class that converts Filter.Expression objects into Elasticsearch query string representation.

    Description

    Converts Filter.Expression into Pinecone metadata filter expression format

    PrintFilterExpressionConverter
    Converts Filter.Expression into test string format.

    GemFireAiSearchFilterExpressionConverter is a class that converts Filter.Expression objects into GemFire VectorDB query string representation.

    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    MariaDBFilterExpressionConverter
    Converts Filter.Expression into MariaDB SQL WHERE clause format using JSON_VALUE functions for metadata filtering.
